title_ja: レトロ低画質・ミラー・ヘッドホン×ピースサイン
title_en: Retro low-res mirror selfie, headphones, red glasses, peace sign
reference_note: See prompt_en.md in this folder for full English. Riamero: omit moles/freckles in prompts; no beauty mark text.

subject.description: Young East Asian woman taking a mirror selfie, oversized silver over-ear headphones, slim red glasses, playful open-mouth expression and peace sign, old-school low-resolution digital snapshot style.
mirror_rules: Printed text readable and correctly oriented, not reversed in final image
No extra fingers, no duplicated phone edges, no floating accessories
Render visible text legibly even if mirror physics would invert — creative priority on readable lettering

eyes.look: Looking at phone screen through mirror

expression.overall: Cute, lively, caught in the moment

face.note_when_no_reference: Natural youthful proportions, soft jawline, delicate nose, clear skin without moles or freckles; light blush, soft eyeliner, gentle under-eye warmth, natural glossy lips

hair.style: Long straight with blunt bangs, a few loose front strands
hair.effect: Smooth glossy with slight flyaways and naturally uneven strands

skin.texture: Soft, smooth, lightly powdered look, touchable
skin.lighting_effect: Warm indoor light with mild highlight bloom on skin and fabric

pose.base: One hand holds phone near face, other hand peace sign, head slightly tilted

top.details: Large pink printed letters across chest, soft worn casual feel
top.effect: Slightly overexposed highlights, washed digital whites

accessories.jewelry: Red ribbon-like choker layered with metallic chain and long vertical pendant
accessories.prop: Oversized silver over-ear headphones; slim translucent red oval glasses

photography.camera_style: Retro mirror selfie, early social media digital snapshot, low-pixel realistic phone photography
photography.angle: Eye-level mirror reflection with slight inward lean
photography.texture: Low resolution, mild compression, soft detail, digital grain, slightly imperfect sharpness
photography.lighting: Warm indoor ambient, uneven and flat, blown highlights on shirt and fingers
photography.depth_of_field: Deep smartphone focus, minimal optical blur

background.setting: Indoor mirror, quiet room or hallway
background.atmosphere: Private, quiet, unpolished, late-night indoor stillness
background.lighting: Dim warm room, soft shadow falloff

the_vibe.energy: Playful intimate, quick snap while listening to music
the_vibe.aesthetic: Old internet mirror selfie, early digital charm, imperfect memorable
the_vibe.authenticity: Slight awkwardness, accidental framing, low-end camera realism
the_vibe.story: Turned to mirror with headphones on, split second before pose became deliberate

avoid_as_positive_style: Not studio lighting or fashion editorial polish
